testcase.name: P-SHARED · share API integration (真 BE :8090 · 0 mock) > TC-INT-1 · 不存在的 token → throw ShareError{code:TOKEN_INVALID}
P-SHARED · share API integration (真 BE :8090 · 0 mock) > TC-INT-2 · 异形 token (无 dot · 非 JWT) → ShareError{code:TOKEN_INVALID}
P-SHARED · share API integration (真 BE :8090 · 0 mock) > TC-INT-3 · wire response 不含 PII 字段名 (relation_id / student_email / original_image_url / sharer_student_id)
P-SHARED · share API integration (真 BE :8090 · 0 mock) > TC-INT-4 · response Cache-Control: no-store (令牌安全 · BE 强制)
share API · status→ShareError code mapping (unit · no mock libs) > 200 → resolve ShareResponse (无 throw)
share API · status→ShareError code mapping (unit · no mock libs) > 410 → throw ShareError{code:TOKEN_EXPIRED, httpStatus:410}
share API · status→ShareError code mapping (unit · no mock libs) > 404 → throw ShareError{code:TOKEN_INVALID, httpStatus:404}
share API · status→ShareError code mapping (unit · no mock libs) > 403 → throw ShareError{code:TOKEN_REVOKED, httpStatus:403}
share API · status→ShareError code mapping (unit · no mock libs) > 5xx → fallback ShareError{code:TOKEN_INVALID} (spec §9 网络异常)
